title: The Salary, Allowances and Pension of Members of Parliament Act, 1954
full_text: The Salary, Allowances and Pension of Members of Parliament Act, 1954 संसद् सदस्‍य वेतन, भत्ता और पेंशनअधिनियम,1954 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195430 Act Number: 30 Enactment Date: 1954-05-22 Act Year: 1954 Short Title: The Salary, Allowances and Pension of Members of Parliament Act, 1954 Hindi Title: संसद् सदस्‍य वेतन, भत्ता और पेंशनअधिनियम,1954 Long Title: An Act to provide for the salary, allowances and pension of Members of Parliament. Ministry: Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs Enforcement Date: 01-06-1954 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Salary, Allowances and Pension of Members of Parliament Act, 1954 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Salaries and daily allowances. Section 4. Travelling allowances. Section 5. Travelling allowances for intermediate journeys. Section 5A. Transit accommodation. Section 6. Free transit by Railway. Section 6A. Free transit by Steamer. Section 6AA. Special facility to members from Ladakh. Section 6B. Travel facilities to members. Section 6C. Air travel facilities in certain circumstances. Section 6D. Special facilities to blind and physically incapacitated Members. Section 7. Allowances during short intervals between the termination of one session and the commencement of another session, etc. Section 8. Constituency allowance and amenities. Section 8A. Pension. Section 8AA. Travel facility to ex-Members. Section 8AB. Rounding off period of pension. Section 8AC. Family pension. Section 8B. Advances for purchase of conveyance. Section 9. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Repealed.
